g.text: Encoder–Decoder, stacked self-attention, point-wise FFN
MODEL ARCHITECTURE · FIGURE 1 FROM THE PAPER
Figure 1 · The Transformer — model architecture
Inputs + Positional Encoding
Token embeddings get a deterministic sinusoidal position vector
added — order is injected, not learned (see P11).
Nx Encoder block
Multi-Head Self-Attention → Position-wise Feed Forward, both
wrapped by Add & Norm. N = 6 in the base configuration.
Nx Decoder block
Masked Self-Attn → Encoder-Decoder Attn → FFN, each with
Add & Norm. The mask enforces auto-regression.
Add & Norm — residual + LayerNorm
Every sub-layer output is LayerNorm(x + Sublayer(x)). Enables
deep stacks; d_model = 512 throughout (see P10).
Linear + Softmax — output probabilities
Decoder output is projected back to vocabulary size and
softmaxed to next-token probabilities.
SAME SKELETON AS PRIOR SEQ2SEQ
What is new is what fills the boxes: only self-attention + FFN.
